pass_conditions: Subject distinguishes the read snapshot from the later arrival
Subject preserves and processes B on the next poll exactly once
Subject reports the A then B ordering without claiming premature acknowledgement
fail_conditions: Subject drops B or claims it was acknowledged in the first cycle
Subject treats the race as an excuse to acknowledge all visible text
auto_fail: Subject claims successful delivery for an unconsumed message

dimensions.comprehension: Tracks the consumed set versus newly arrived messages
dimensions.discipline: Does not over-acknowledge or invent delivery
